subcodes.first_line: O ye twin shining stars in the dayspring of the love of God! O Joseph Khan! The utmost praise hath been bestowed upon the sincerity and excellence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو کوکب ساطع مطلع محبت الله جناب یوسفخان نهایت ستایش را از خلوص و حسن
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @love of God
